title: Traffic & Infrastructure 2022
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is closing South Geddes Street between Richmond Avenue and Wilkinson Street beginning December 22, 2022 to repair a water main leak. This infrastructure maintenance work impacts traffic flow and public access in the affected corridor.
